author: @osmbsmy.706
text:
Scientific studies are overly respected and revered by those who don't understand the humility they were undertaken in.
That leads to abuse in the use of bell weather findings to win arguments and later bad decision making and bad policies.
The scientific method doesn't beg for the authority it's been given, like philosophy does for example, but it's given that same "unescapable" weight in the heat of the moment.

author: @dvhx
text: Somewhat similar and equally fascinating concept is Phlogiston theory.

author: @Sailormoon1v
text: Animal magnetism, phrenology, the doctor who did head transplants on monkeys, reanimation... it's a loooooong list. It wouldn't surprise me if most "science" turns out to be pathological. Your earlier video on how science progresses goes hand in hand with this one.

author: @takyrdai2432
text: The "times" never change, but human perception does.

author: @Ken00001010
text: ... and that is why we can't have nice things. :-(
